title: orchis patens
intro: Orchis patens, also known as the yellow helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Orchis patens is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
